intro: Corytoplectus capitatus, also known as the Coral Crest or Coral Top, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Corytoplectus capitatus include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
